tasks.description: Create FastAPI app shell with SSE broadcaster in web/app.py and web/sse.py.
acceptance_criteria: FastAPI app exists in web/app.py with CORS middleware and a health endpoint (GET /api/health).
SSE broadcaster exists in web/sse.py with publish() and subscribe() functions for real-time event streaming.
GET /sse/updates endpoint streams Server-Sent Events to connected clients.
Health endpoint returns JSON with version, phase status, and uptime.
Tests cover health endpoint response and SSE subscription/publish round-trip.

tasks.description: Create read-only API routes in web/routes.py for portfolio, positions, grid, beliefs, stats, and reconciliation.
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/portfolio returns current portfolio state as JSON.
GET /api/positions returns open positions with P&L as JSON.
GET /api/grid/{pair} returns grid status for a pair (active slots, phase distribution, cycle history).
GET /api/beliefs returns latest beliefs per source per pair.
GET /api/stats returns strategy statistics (placeholder structure).
GET /api/reconciliation returns last reconciliation result.
All endpoints are GET-only. No POST, PUT, or DELETE endpoints exist.
Routes accept injected state (dependency injection pattern) rather than importing global state.
Tests cover each endpoint with mock state data.

tasks.description: Create static frontend shell: index.html, app.js (SSE connection), and styles.css.
acceptance_criteria: web/static/index.html provides the dashboard layout with placeholder sections for portfolio, grid, beliefs, stats, and reconciliation.
web/static/app.js connects to /sse/updates and dispatches events to placeholder update functions.
web/static/styles.css provides basic responsive styling.
FastAPI serves static files from web/static/ at the root path.
HTML references app.js and styles.css correctly.
No D3.js in this task -- just the shell that D3 modules will plug into.

tasks.description: Create D3.js grid status visualization in web/static/d3-grid.js.
acceptance_criteria: d3-grid.js exports a renderGridStatus() function that takes grid state JSON and a DOM container ID.
Visualizes: active slot count per phase (S0/S1a/S1b/S2) as a stacked bar or heatmap.
Visualizes: recent grid cycle P&L as a mini bar chart (green for profit, red for loss).
Updates incrementally via SSE events without full re-render.
File is under 300 lines (leaves room for future additions within 500 cap).
Tests verify the module exports the expected function and handles empty/null data gracefully.

tasks.description: Create D3.js belief agreement visualization in web/static/d3-beliefs.js.
acceptance_criteria: d3-beliefs.js exports a renderBeliefMatrix() function that takes belief data JSON and a DOM container ID.
Visualizes a source x pair matrix showing agreement/disagreement with color coding.
Shows consensus direction and strength for each pair.
Updates incrementally via SSE events.
File is under 300 lines.
Tests verify the module exports the expected function and handles empty/null data gracefully.

tasks.description: Create Telegram alert module in alerts/telegram.py and alerts/formatter.py.
acceptance_criteria: TelegramAlerter class sends messages to a configured chat via bot token.
MessageFormatter formats alert types: position_opened, position_closed, stop_triggered, reconciliation_mismatch, belief_stale, guardian_action.
Each alert type has a distinct format with key details (pair, price, P&L where relevant).
If TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN or TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID is not set, alerter logs a warning and no-ops (does not crash).
Tests mock the HTTP call and verify message formatting for each alert type.
